_patch_meta.description: CANONICAL-FORMAT REWRITE of wa-cluster-M05-patch-boundary-pverses-v1-20260507.json. Same intent, same target rows, same values; only the patch envelope was reshaped to the applicator spec (terms_covered list, set instead of values, op_id added). Original retained for audit. Assigns the two remaining P-status verses in M05-BOUNDARY to G-status with group assignments. Amo 5:21 (H6116 a.tsa.rah, vr=192566) -> Group 2148 (solemn assembly group). 2Pe 1:3 (G1433 doreo, vr=215044) -> Group 2597 (God's granting group). Researcher decision confirmed 20260507.
_patch_meta.supersedes: wa-cluster-M05-patch-boundary-pverses-v1-20260507 (format errors: terms_covered dict, values instead of set, no op_id)

set.notes: Amo 5:21 — divine rejection of solemn assembly lacking inner characteristics (love, justice). Assigned G-status to Group 2148 (solemn assembly group) in BOUNDARY for later analysis. Inner characteristic content (love, goodness) belongs to M05-A and M05-D; assembly occasion is the BOUNDARY term. Researcher decision 20260507.

2Pe 1:3 — divine granting of all things for life and godliness. Assigned G-status to Group 2597 (God's granting group) in BOUNDARY. The granting act enables koinonos participation in divine nature (M05-G Group 1057, 2Pe 1:4); doreo names the enabling giving-act, not the participation characteristic itself. Researcher decision 20260507.
